maml:description.maml:para: Import existing environment details previously exported using the `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` function from the `AzPolicyLens.Discovery` module.
Import existing environment details previously exported using the `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` function from the `AzPolicyLens.Discovery` module.
AES Encryption Initialization Vector (IV) Content.
AES Encryption Key Content.
File path for the Environment Data to import
AES Encryption key file path. Use the same key to decrypt the file if it is encrypted.
File path for the Environment Data to import
File path for the Environment Data to import
AES Encryption Initialization Vector (IV) Content.
AES Encryption Key Content.
AES Encryption key file path. Use the same key to decrypt the file if it is encrypted.
File path for the Environment Data to import
Imported environment discovery data.

maml:introduction.maml:para: Import environment details from the unencrypted discovery data from file `C:\Temp\output.zip`.
Import environment details from the encrypted discovery data from file `C:\Temp\output.zip` using the encryption key stored in `C:\Temp\AzplEncryptionKey.json`.
Import environment details from the encrypted discovery data from file `C:\Temp\output.zip` using the content of the AES encryption key and Initialization Vector.

maml:description.maml:para:
Generate detailed documentation for the entire environment, a subset of subscriptions, or a child management group sub-tree.
The detailed documentation is intended to be used by the support engineers of the Azure cloud platform.
The basic documentation is intended to be used by the customer of the Azure cloud platform.

Generate the basic or detailed documentation for the entire environment, a subset of subscriptions, or a sub-tree rooted at a child management group. The basic documentation does not include the following: hidden tags for subscriptions, any metadata that starts with 'hidden-' or 'hidden_' for policy resources, Management group hierarchy mermaid diagram, management group summary, deprecated policy resources, unassigned policy resources, etc..
The output base directory.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.
The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).
The title of the wiki.
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
The output base directory.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.
The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).
The subset of subscription Ids (GUID) to generate the documentation for.
The title of the wiki.
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
The output base directory.
The Id of a child management group to generate the documentation for. The documentation will include the specified management group and all of its descendants.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.
The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).
The title of the wiki.
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
The output base directory.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
AES Encryption key file path. This key is used to decrypt the existing environment discovery file.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.
The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).
The title of the wiki.
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
The output base directory.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
AES Encryption key file path. This key is used to decrypt the existing environment discovery file.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.

The subset of subscription Ids (GUID) to generate the documentation for.

The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.

The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).

The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
The output base directory.
The Id of a child management group to generate the documentation for. The documentation will include the specified management group and all of its descendants.
The warning percentage threshold for policy compliance summary. Accepted range: 1 - 99.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
The directory contains custom security control definitions.
File path for the Environment Data to import. Only `.zip` files produced by `Invoke-AzplEnvironmentDiscovery` are supported.
AES Encryption Initialization Vector (IV) Content.
AES Encryption Key Content.
AES Encryption key file path. This key is used to decrypt the existing environment discovery file.
The warning days for the expiration of the policy exemption. Accepted range: 7 - 90.
The page style (detailed for engineers or basic for customers).
The subset of subscription Ids (GUID) to generate the documentation for.
The title of the wiki.
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
The wiki style. Supported values are "ado" and "github".
File paths for the list of files generated by the cmdlet.
Paths of the generated documentation files.

maml:introduction.maml:para: PS C:\> New-AzplDocumentation -PageStyle 'detailed' -BaseOutputPath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki' -Title 'My Azure Policy Detailed Documentation' -WikiStyle 'github' -DiscoveryDataImportFilePath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki\Discovery.zip'
Generates the detailed GitHub Wiki documentation for the entire environment using the discovery data that was not encrypted.

PS C:\> $subscriptionIds = @('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002') PS C:\> New-AzplDocumentation -PageStyle 'basic' -SubscriptionIds $subscriptionIds -BaseOutputPath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki' -Title 'My Azure Policy Basic Documentation' -WikiStyle 'github' -DiscoveryDataImportFilePath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki\Discovery.zip' -EncryptionKeyFilePath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki\EncryptionKey.json' -ComplianceWarningPercentageThreshold 90 -ExemptionExpiresOnWarningDays 15

Generates the basic GitHub Wiki documentation for the 2 subscriptions using the encryption key file and non-default thresholds for compliance warning and exemption expiration warning, saving the output files in the specified base output path.

PS C:\> New-AzplDocumentation -PageStyle 'basic' -BaseOutputPath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki' -Title 'My Azure Policy Basic Documentation' -WikiStyle 'github' -DiscoveryDataImportFilePath 'C:\AzPolicyLens\Wiki\Discovery.zip' -EncryptionKey 'MyEncryptionKey' -EncryptionIV 'MyEncryptionIV'

Generates the basic GitHub Wiki documentation for the entire environment using the existing encrypted discovery data, saving the output files in the specified base output path. The discovery data is decrypted using the provided AES encryption key and IV.
Generates the detailed Azure DevOps Wiki documentation scoped to the child management group `mg-platform` and all of its descendants, using unencrypted discovery data.
